items.description: Multi vehicle crash on I-76 eastbound between 1.8 miles west of Exit 338: GREEN LANE/BELMONT AVE and 1.1 miles west of Exit 338: GREEN LANE/BELMONT AVE. There is a lane restriction.
items.formatted: I-76 (Montgomery County) | Multi vehicle crash on I-76 eastbound between 1.8 miles west of Exit 338: GREEN LANE/BELMONT AVE and 1.1 miles west of Exit 338: GREEN LANE/BELMONT AVE. Estimated Reopen: 6/16/26 - 21:00
